signals.headline: Ethereum Price Surge Confirmed: Up 4-4
signals.raw:

signals.headline: Elon Musk April Tweet Volume Markets Trending on Polymarket | NO | LOW confidence**
signals.raw:
Elon Musk April Tweet Volume Markets Trending on Polymarket | NO | LOW confidence**

Polymarket's most active markets focus on **Elon Musk's tweet counts**, such as "Elon Musk # tweets April 17 - April 24, 2026?" (trading at 38% for 220-239 range) and "Elon Musk # tweets in April 2026?" (21% for 1120-1159 range), with over $20M+ in volume across 20-130 live tweet markets[2][3][4].
